data.body:
currently the text on some of the tabs will wrap and scrunch up.

use your front end design skills to come up with a nicer way of displaying tabs when real estate is crunched.  some suggestions, which you are NOT limited to, are:

truncating tab labels to just show the beat id (with project prefix)
navigation arrows to indicate scrollability with hotkeys and mouse.
data.title: ui terminals:  better handling of tabs when browser width can't accomodate the tabs
